fact_nuggets.text: Purifying Salt (Japanese: Purifying Salt) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature Ability of Nacli's evolutionary line.
Signature Ability of Nacli'S Evolutionary Line

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt grants the Pokemon immunity from all non-volatile status conditions and halves the Attack and Special Attack of an attacking Pokemon during damage calculation if targeted by a Ghost-type move. Rest fails if used by a Pokemon with Purifying Salt. If the Pokemon has a status condition and gains this Ability, the status condition will not be cured and remains in effect. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Purifying Salt grants the Pokemon immunity from all non-volatile status conditions and halves the Attack and Special Attack of an attacking Pokemon during damage calculation if targeted by a Ghost-type move. Rest fails if used by a Pokemon with Purifying Salt. If the Pokemon has a status condition and gains this Ability, the status condition will not be cured and remains in effect.
Protects from status conditions and halves damage from Ghost-type moves.
